steps.title: Factor the target expression
steps.content:
The expression $21+7x$ contains the same group as the given expression after factoring.
$$21+7x=7(3+x)$$

steps.title: Use the given value
steps.content: Substitute $3+x=64$ into the factored expression. $$7(3+x)=7(64)=448$$ The answer is 448.
